title: Create Mod Panorama
description: A panorama of an iron farm made in the create mod
body:
A pack that changes the menu panorama to an iron farm built with the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create).
The template originates from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/), Please refer to them for the proper licensing, as I have no idea what I'm doing.
Also, don't get mad if you think that it was suboptimally built, it's supposed to be flashy.
